revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-3-485

Ring around (in secondary radar)

1. The undesired triggering of a transponder by its own transmitter.

2. The triggering of a transponder at all bearings causing a ring presentation on a P.P.I.

{{IALAFooter}}
